# Canned PR fixture — F-04 PR-review convergence

This fixture exercises the `scripts/pr-review-harness.ts` dispatcher end-to-end
against a deterministic in-memory `gh` stub. The two iterations encoded here
converge the F-04 loop in **2 iterations**:

| Iteration | gh-runner returns | Adapter findings | Driver decision |
|-----------|-------------------|------------------|-----------------|
| 1 | `gh-iter-1.json` (2 `![high]` blockers on `src/auth/session.ts`) | `blockingCount: 2` | NOT_CONVERGED — call integrator |
| 2 | `gh-iter-2.json` (one `![low]` nit) | `blockingCount: 0` | CONVERGED |

Files:

- `converge.config.toon` — the F-04 `converge.config` generated by the wrapper
- `unknown-adapter.config.toon` — same shape with `botAdapter: unsupportedBot`
  to drive the `CODE: ADAPTER_UNKNOWN` failure path
- `gh-iter-1.json`, `gh-iter-2.json` — canned `gh` responses keyed by iteration
- `expected-pr-state-iter-1.toon`, `expected-pr-state-iter-2.toon` — golden
  TOON snapshots (used by the test's prefix-match assertions)
- `expected-findings-iter-1.toon`, `expected-findings-iter-2.toon` — golden
  `findings.toon` envelopes

The test file `test/pr-review-harness.test.ts` consumes this fixture via an
injected `GhRunner` stub.
